query:
UPDATE vehicles SET
                number_plate = $2,
                description = $3,
                water_capacity = $4,
                type = $5,
                status = $6,
                model = $7,
                driving_license = $8,
                height = $9,
                length = $10,
                width = $11,
                weight = $12,
                provider = $13,
                additional_informations = $14,
                archived_at = $15,
                organization_id = $16
            WHERE id = $1
